task_completion.description: Open the nuclei.tif image for analysis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Fiji/ImageJ interface or an image viewer/script showing the nuclei.tif image loaded from ~/Fiji_Data/raw/cell_cycle/.

task_completion.description: Perform background subtraction using a 50-pixel rolling ball
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Subtract Background' dialog box with the rolling ball radius set to 50, or code/terminal output indicating this specific operation was applied.

task_completion.description: Segment nuclei using Otsu thresholding and watershed separation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Threshold dialog set to 'Otsu', a binary mask of the nuclei, and/or the application of a 'Watershed' operation showing separation lines between touching cells.

task_completion.description: Measure Integrated Density for particles with a size of 100-Infinity
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Analyze Particles' dialog with size set to '100-Infinity', 'Set Measurements' with 'Integrated Density' checked, or a Results table displaying 'IntDen' values.

task_completion.description: Save the measurements table to measurements.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file explorer, or terminal command showing the creation of 'measurements.csv' in ~/Fiji_Data/results/cell_cycle/.

task_completion.description: Generate and save the histogram plot to histogram.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A histogram plot window (showing the distribution of Integrated Density) and evidence of it being saved as 'histogram.png' in the results directory.

task_completion.description: Identify the G1 phase peak and save it to g1_peak_report.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command writing a numeric value (the identified mode/peak from the histogram) into 'g1_peak_report.txt' in the results directory.

integrity.description: The agent actually performed image processing rather than just creating mock output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing interaction with Fiji/ImageJ menus (Process, Analyze, etc.) or a Python/macro script being written and executed to process the image.

integrity.description: The G1 peak value was derived from the actual histogram/measurements, not guessed or hardcoded.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen looking at the histogram plot, results table, or using a script to calculate the mode/peak before writing it to the text report.

integrity.description: Outputs were saved to the exact requested directories without manual moving after the fact.
integrity.visual_evidence: Save dialogs or script paths explicitly point to ~/Fiji_Data/results/cell_cycle/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input image is a synthetic 512x512 uint16 image containing 30 G1-phase cells (intensity ~20000) and 10 G2-phase cells (intensity ~40000). The expected outputs are measurements.csv, histogram.png, and g1_peak_report.txt. The G1 peak value written to the report should be approximately 20000 (a 15% tolerance is acceptable).
